questions.prompt: Put the onboarding phases in the right order.
items: Pre-create the Huntress Organization with name aligned to the PSA company
Pilot agent rollout, then production rollout to the customer's estate
Audit Defender state, then enforce Recommended Defaults; map the customer in PSA Auto-Map
Enable ITDR for the M365 tenant, generate the Identity Security Assessment
Allowlist SAT phishing IPs and run a baseline campaign
Day-30 customer review covering what we found and what's next
questions.explanation: Each phase depends on the previous one. Skipping forward (e.g. ITDR before the Organization exists) creates re-work. The 30-day review closes the onboarding arc with the customer.
